features.title: Project URL opening rules
features.body: Projects can now keep their own saved URL opening rules, including rules that target an existing pane in that project.

features.title: URL pattern matching
features.body: Saved link-opening rules can now use wildcard URL patterns such as `https://example.com/*`.

features.title: Modified link clicks
features.body: Ctrl-click, Command-click, and middle-click links inside web apps now route through Boatyard's link-opening flow instead of bypassing it.

features.title: Rule layout previews
features.body: Existing-pane rules now show a mini pane layout that highlights the source and target panes.

features.title: Open dialog defaults
features.body: When a saved rule matches a link, the open dialog now preselects that rule's target, scope, and pattern.

features.title: Rule scopes
features.body: URL opening rules now focus on URL patterns and source apps, making saved behavior easier to understand and reuse.

features.title: Global rule control
features.body: The open dialog now separates saving a rule from applying it globally, while keeping existing-pane rules tied to the current project.

features.title: Stale pane targets
features.body: Saved rules that point to missing panes are ignored instead of applying to an unavailable destination.

features.title: Rule editing clarity
features.body: Project-specific and existing-pane rules now preserve pane labels and show clearer source, target, and scope details while editing.

features.title: Web app pane targets
features.body: Links from web apps can now be opened directly in an existing pane, with a visual pane picker and optional saved rules for the source pane.

features.title: Split panes
features.body: Splitting a pane now opens the manual in the new pane when available, keeping the current web app in place.

features.title: Project settings layout
features.body: Project settings now use a denser two-column layout that keeps related controls easier to scan.

features.title: Custom URL backgrounds
features.body: Custom URL web apps now use a white loading background, reducing dark flashes on light websites.

features.title: Web app framing
features.body: Embedded web apps are inset slightly so their content fits the pane more cleanly.

features.title: Twicc burn gauges
features.body: Burn-rate gauges now scale correctly above normal usage and show over-limit usage more clearly.

features.title: Changelog version menus
features.body: Version dropdown options now use readable colors in the changelog and plugin settings dialogs.

features.title: Overlay dialogs over web apps
features.body: Dialogs that freeze overlapping web app content now wait for web app visibility to sync and use the visible dialog content bounds, reducing stale or incorrect freeze areas.

features.title: Pier worktree creation
features.body: Create a new Pier worktree from the Pier widget, with branch, base ref, path, and start-after-create options.

features.title: Pier worktree removal
features.body: Remove Pier worktrees from the widget, with confirmation options for forced removal and snapshot purging.

features.title: Worktree path pattern
features.body: Configure the default Pier worktree path using project, repository, and worktree tokens.

features.title: Pier widget actions
features.body: The Pier widget now groups New and Refresh controls in the header and shows per-worktree removal controls.

features.title: Widget titles
features.body: Project widgets use more consistent, compact title styling across Pier, terminal, Hawser, Telegram, and color palette widgets.

features.title: Pane expansion controls
features.body: Hovering or focusing the expand control now previews the pane group that will expand, and active shrink controls are easier to recognize.

features.title: Overlay dialogs over web apps
features.body: Settings, changelog, group, and URL dialogs now freeze overlapping web app content more consistently to prevent embedded views from interfering with dialogs.

features.title: Terminal tab context menu
features.body: Right-click a shell tab to rename it, open a new shell to its right, or close it.

features.title: Scrollable shell tabs
features.body: Terminal tab bars now support horizontal scrolling with arrow controls and mouse wheel gestures when many shells are open.

features.title: New shell placement
features.body: Creating a shell from a terminal pane now places it next to the active shell instead of always appending it at the end.

features.title: Pane terminal tabs
features.body: Terminal panes now keep shell tabs in the pane tab area, making multi-pane terminal layouts easier to scan.

features.title: Shell closing flow
features.body: Closing a shell now happens from the tab menu, with the close action disabled when only one shell remains.

features.title: Pane expand and shrink controls
features.body: Web app panes now include toolbar buttons for temporarily focusing one pane and returning to the previous split layout.

features.title: Remembered pane focus
features.body: Expanded pane state is now saved with the project layout, so focused panes stay consistent after the workspace reloads.

features.title: Project search
features.body: The sidebar can now filter projects by name, slug, source path, or group.

features.title: Create group from project
features.body: Project rows now offer a context menu action for creating a new group around that project.

features.title: Sidebar update notice
features.body: Downloaded updates now appear in the sidebar with a restart button when they are ready to install.

features.title: Web app hard reload
features.body: Web app panes now offer a hard reload action that clears cache before refreshing.

features.title: Group explode confirmation
features.body: Exploding a project group now uses a simpler confirmation dialog without requiring the group name to be typed.

features.title: Grouped project badges
features.body: Collapsed groups now show separate status badges for their projects instead of merging everything into one combined badge.

features.title: Project groups
features.body: Projects can now be assigned to named groups and collapsed in the sidebar.

features.title: Group management menu
features.body: Project groups can be renamed or exploded from a context menu without editing each project one by one.

features.title: Project sidebar dragging
features.body: Dragging projects now shows insertion targets and supports moving projects into, out of, and between groups.

features.title: Expanded group layout
features.body: Expanded groups now use a compact rail for collapsing and dragging while keeping project rows easy to scan.

features.title: AppImage launcher path
features.body: AppImage installs now consistently use `~/.local/bin/boatyard` for the terminal launcher.

features.title: Terminal status display
features.body: Terminal panes no longer show diagnostic chunk counters in the status line.

features.title: Changelog history
features.body: The update panel now includes a Changelog button for reviewing release notes from inside Boatyard.

features.title: Terminal display
features.body: Embedded terminals now hide the tmux status bar so the terminal area stays cleaner.

features.title: Web app overlays
features.body: Overlay blur is now off by default, keeping web apps easier to read when dialogs or menus appear.

features.title: Update status
features.body: Update checks now show clearer checked-at timestamps and keep the latest check result visible in the update panel.

features.title: Terminal rendering stability
features.body: Terminal panes now resize and refresh more reliably, reducing stale layouts and delayed tab updates.

features.title: Overlay responsiveness
features.body: Web apps are now frozen only when an overlay actually covers them, avoiding unnecessary interruptions in other panes.

features.title: What's new tracking
features.body: Post-update release notes now use the stored previous app version instead of relying on restart environment state.

features.title: What's new after updates
features.body: Boatyard can now show release notes after an update, including highlights from versions you skipped.

features.title: Pane controls
features.body: Split, close, navigation, autofill, and widget-pane actions now use clearer icon buttons.

features.title: Project creation flow
features.body: The source path field now appears first and receives focus so project details can be derived sooner.

features.title: Widget edit dragging
features.body: Moving widgets now shows a better-aligned drop preview, clearer trash dropzone feedback, and calmer inactive tabs.

features.title: Widget resize feedback
features.body: The active resize border or corner now stays highlighted throughout the resize gesture.

features.title: What's new filtering
features.body: Documentation-only entries and maintainer workflow notes no longer appear in Boatyard's in-app post-update changelog.
